requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (O'z DSt / GOST-IEC Standards, UzStandard)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——辐射及传导发射（O'z DSt/GOST-IEC标准，UzStandard）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——輻射及傳導發射（O'z DSt/GOST-IEC標準，UzStandard）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices sold in Uzbekistan must conform to EMC requirements specified under applicable O'z DSt standards published by UzStandard (Uzbekistan Agency for Technical Regulation). These standards are substantially derived from GOST standards (adopted from former Soviet / CIS technical norms) and are progressively aligned with IEC CISPR publications. Radiated and conducted emission limits apply to both intentional and unintentional radiators. Conformity is demonstrated through a UzStandard conformity certificate or declaration supported by accredited laboratory test reports. The UzACI type-approval process for radio equipment typically incorporates EMC testing.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦销售的无线及物联网设备须符合UzStandard（乌兹别克斯坦技术法规局）发布的适用O'z DSt标准规定的电磁兼容要求。这些标准主要源自GOST标准（采用前苏联/独联体技术规范），并逐步向IEC CISPR系列标准对齐。辐射和传导发射限值适用于有意和无意辐射体。合规性通过经认可实验室测试报告支持的UzStandard合格证书或声明加以证明。无线电设备的UzACI型号核准流程通常包含电磁兼容测试。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克斯坦銷售的無線及物聯網裝置須符合UzStandard（烏茲別克斯坦技術法規局）發布的適用O'z DSt標準規定的電磁相容要求。這些標準主要源自GOST標準（採用前蘇聯/獨聯體技術規範），並逐步向IEC CISPR系列標準對齊。輻射和傳導發射限值適用於有意和無意輻射體。合規性通過經認可實驗室測試報告支持的UzStandard合格證書或聲明加以證明。無線電設備的UzACI型號核准流程通常包含電磁相容測試。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt standards (GOST/IEC CISPR-derived EMC emission and immunity limits)
GOST R 51318.22 / GOST R 51318.24 (legacy reference basis, CISPR 22/24 equivalent)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and information technology equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (Class A/B emissions, based on CISPR 22) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, based on IEC 61000-3-2). These standards are referenced in the CCC certification process. Chinese GB-based EMC test reports are not directly transferable to Uzbekistan but can serve as a technical baseline for UzStandard testing.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及信息技术设备的电磁兼容合规依据GB/T 9254（A/B类发射，基于CISPR 22）及GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，基于IEC 61000-3-2），并在CCC认证流程中作为参考依据。中国GB标准电磁兼容测试报告不可直接转用于乌兹别克斯坦，但可作为UzStandard测试的技术基准。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及資訊技術設備的電磁相容合規依據GB/T 9254（A/B類發射，基於CISPR 22）及GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，基於IEC 61000-3-2），並在CCC認證流程中作為參考依據。中國GB標準電磁相容測試報告不可直接轉用於烏茲別克斯坦，但可作為UzStandard測試的技術基準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (CISPR 22 equivalent — Class A/B radiated and conducted emissions)

gap.en: Partial technical overlap — both systems reference CISPR / IEC CISPR norms — but Chinese GB EMC certificates are not mutually recognised by UzStandard. Separate testing to applicable O'z DSt standards, at an accredited laboratory, is required to support the UzStandard conformity certificate. Some GB-based test data may reduce re-testing scope if the applicable O'z DSt limits are confirmed equivalent.
gap.zh: 技术上存在部分重叠——两套体系均参照CISPR/IEC CISPR规范——但中国GB电磁兼容证书不被UzStandard互认。须在认可实验室依适用O'z DSt标准另行测试，以支持UzStandard合格证书。若确认适用O'z DSt限值与GB等效，部分GB测试数据或可减少重新测试范围。
gap.zht: 技術上存在部分重疊——兩套體系均參照CISPR/IEC CISPR規範——但中國GB電磁相容證書不被UzStandard互認。須在認可實驗室依適用O'z DSt標準另行測試，以支持UzStandard合格證書。若確認適用O'z DSt限值與GB等效，部分GB測試數據或可減少重新測試範圍。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to applicable O'z DSt standards (GOST/IEC CISPR-derived) is required for wireless devices in Uzbekistan, evidenced by a UzStandard conformity certificate. Chinese GB/T 9254 and GB 17625 test reports are not accepted as a substitute but may reduce re-testing scope where limits align. Confirm current applicable O'z DSt standard numbers with UzStandard before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线设备在乌兹别克斯坦须符合适用O'z DSt标准（GOST/IEC CISPR衍生）的电磁兼容要求，并以UzStandard合格证书为证明。中国GB/T 9254及GB 17625测试报告不可替代，但在限值相同时或可减少重新测试范围。测试前请向UzStandard确认当前适用的O'z DSt标准编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線裝置在烏茲別克斯坦須符合適用O'z DSt標準（GOST/IEC CISPR衍生）的電磁相容要求，並以UzStandard合格證書為證明。中國GB/T 9254及GB 17625測試報告不可取代，但在限值相同時或可減少重新測試範圍。測試前請向UzStandard確認當前適用的O'z DSt標準編號。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity Requirements (O'z DSt / IEC 61000 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——抗扰度要求（O'z DSt / IEC 61000系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——抗擾度要求（O'z DSt / IEC 61000系列）

summary.en: In addition to emission limits, wireless and IoT devices sold in Uzbekistan may be subject to EMC immunity requirements under applicable O'z DSt standards, which reference GOST-IEC 61000 series equivalents covering electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients (EFT), surges, and conducted/radiated immunity. Immunity testing requirements are particularly relevant for devices used in industrial or critical-environment applications. Consumer wireless products are typically tested for immunity as part of the UzACI type-approval process.
summary.zh: 除发射限值外，在乌兹别克斯坦销售的无线及物联网设备可能须符合适用O'z DSt标准中关于电磁兼容抗扰度的要求，该标准参照涵盖静电放电（ESD）、电快速瞬变（EFT）、浪涌及传导/辐射抗扰度的GOST-IEC 61000系列等效标准。抗扰度测试要求尤其适用于工业或关键环境应用场合的设备；消费类无线产品通常在UzACI型号核准流程中一并进行抗扰度测试。
summary.zht: 除發射限值外，在烏茲別克斯坦銷售的無線及物聯網裝置可能須符合適用O'z DSt標準中關於電磁相容抗擾度的要求，該標準參照涵蓋靜電放電（ESD）、電快速瞬變（EFT）、突波及傳導/輻射抗擾度的GOST-IEC 61000系列等效標準。抗擾度測試要求尤其適用於工業或關鍵環境應用場合的設備；消費類無線產品通常在UzACI型號核准流程中一併進行抗擾度測試。

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity is covered by GB/T 17618 (IEC 61000-4 series) and related GB/T standards. Immunity test reports are generated as part of CCC technical file preparation for relevant product categories. The scope of mandatory immunity testing in China depends on the specific product standard applicable to the device category.
summary.zh: 在中国，电磁兼容抗扰度依据GB/T 17618（IEC 61000-4系列）及相关GB/T标准执行，抗扰度测试报告作为相关类别产品CCC技术文件的组成部分。中国强制性抗扰度测试范围取决于适用于特定设备类别的产品标准。
summary.zht: 在中國，電磁相容抗擾度依據GB/T 17618（IEC 61000-4系列）及相關GB/T標準執行，抗擾度測試報告作為相關類別產品CCC技術文件的組成部分。中國強制性抗擾度測試範圍取決於適用於特定設備類別的產品標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 (IEC 61000-4 series equivalent — immunity test methods)
GB 4943.1 (product safety standard referencing immunity context for ITE)

gap.en: Moderate gap. Both systems reference IEC 61000-4 series foundations but through different adopted standard numbers (O'z DSt vs. GB/T). Chinese immunity test reports are not recognised by UzStandard. Confirm with UzACI and UzStandard which O'z DSt immunity standards apply to the specific device category, then arrange accredited laboratory re-testing.
gap.zh: 中等差距。两套体系均以IEC 61000-4系列为基础，但采用不同标准编号（O'z DSt与GB/T）。中国抗扰度测试报告不被UzStandard认可。应向UzACI和UzStandard确认适用于特定设备类别的O'z DSt抗扰度标准，再安排认可实验室重新测试。
gap.zht: 中等差距。兩套體系均以IEC 61000-4系列為基礎，但採用不同標準編號（O'z DSt與GB/T）。中國抗擾度測試報告不被UzStandard認可。應向UzACI和UzStandard確認適用於特定設備類別的O'z DSt抗擾度標準，再安排認可實驗室重新測試。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity conformity to applicable O'z DSt standards (IEC 61000-4 series equivalent) is required for wireless and IoT devices in Uzbekistan. Chinese GB/T 17618 immunity test reports are not accepted as a substitute. Confirm the exact O'z DSt standards applicable to the product category with UzStandard before planning laboratory testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线及物联网设备在乌兹别克斯坦须符合适用O'z DSt标准（IEC 61000-4系列等效）的电磁兼容抗扰度要求。中国GB/T 17618抗扰度测试报告不可替代。在规划实验室测试前，请向UzStandard确认适用于该产品类别的具体O'z DSt标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線及物聯網裝置在烏茲別克斯坦須符合適用O'z DSt標準（IEC 61000-4系列等效）的電磁相容抗擾度要求。中國GB/T 17618抗擾度測試報告不可取代。在規劃實驗室測試前，請向UzStandard確認適用於該產品類別的具體O'z DSt標準。
